chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal 172 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.929/2017 2. For orders on CMA No.930/2017 3. For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A” 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA No.931/2017 22.10.2025 This High Court Appeal is pending since 2017 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. On the last date following order was passed: “03.10.2023 None present. No one is present on behalf of the appellants to assist the Court. This appeal which is barred by limitation, is pending since March 2017. If none appears on the next date of hearing, appropriate orders shall be passed as may be deemed fit. Let an intimation notice for the next date be issued to the appellants and their counsel as well as to learned D.A.G. Adjourned.” Today appellant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the appellant is not interested in proceeding with the matter, therefore, this High Court Appeal is dismissed for non- prosecution. Judge Judge Amjad
